title: Parosela sericea
taxonomy: Parosela sericea is classified as a genus within the family Euphorbiaceae, which belongs to the order Malpighiales. This classification places Parosela sericea within the larger clade of flowering plants (angiosperms). More specifically, it is part of the superorder Rosanae, which includes a diverse range of plant families. The family Euphorbiaceae is characterized by its large size and diverse members, including various species of trees, shrubs, and herbs. Parosela sericea's classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in this clade.
